steps.action: GET /api/health on the assigned audit instance
steps.expected: Local audit instance is reachable and healthy
steps.observed: Returned 200 with status ok and deploymentMode local_trusted

steps.action: GET /api/companies on the assigned audit instance
steps.expected: Onboarded company exists before TUI launch

steps.action: Launch the shipped orchestrator TUI through a PTY with `pnpm dev:tui --url http://localhost:3100`
steps.expected: TUI opens into a usable company-scoped console after onboarding
steps.observed: TUI launched successfully and rendered `Papierklammer · Audit Demo Company`, `Connected | 2 agents | 0 active runs`, agent list, chat panel, and input prompt `> Type a message...`

evidence.precheck: GET /api/health -> 200; GET /api/companies -> 200 with Audit Demo Company

summary: Tested 1 assertion: VAL-DEMO-008 passed. The shipped PTY-launched orchestrator TUI opened successfully after onboarding and showed a usable console scoped to Audit Demo Company.
